title: Bridge Essay: Disentangling the neural correlates of agency, ownership and multisensory proces

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Disentangling the neural correlates of agency, ownership and multisensory processing.**. Neuroimage.. PMID: 37414232. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120255. The experience of the self as an embodied agent in the world is an essential aspect of human consciousness. This experience arises from the feeling of control over one'sbodily actions, termed the Sense of Agency, and the feeling that the body belongs to the self, Body Ownership.
